items.name: [⭐ 🎃] Pot Bot Buddy
items.description:
Brace yourself for a spooky twist on your farming companion! The Pot Bot Buddy, now in Halloween Edition, brings a sinister charm to Sky Farm Island adventures. With its creepy face peeking from inside, this eerie helper is adorned with hauntingly golden details to bring both style and scares to your farming journeys. Perfect for Halloween or any time you want to add a touch of mischief to your farm!
